items.title: Municipal WWTP Upgrade
items.summary: Upgraded aeration, secondary clarification, and chemical dosing systems to improve BOD and nutrient removal for a 10 MLD plant.

items.title: Industrial Pretreatment Package
items.summary: Delivered a compact pretreatment and equalization solution for a food processing facility, reducing TSS and fat/oil loads before discharge.

items.title: Operator Training & Commissioning
items.summary: Provided on-site operator training, startup support, and instrumentation tuning to achieve stable nitrification within startup window.
